key.name: test-mode-enabled
key.description: Enables simulated data for debugging the user interface.

key.name: test-force-alive
key.description: When test mode is on, this determines if the agent should be reported as active.

key.name: status-active
key.description: Comma-separated list of values that should give a green light (e.g., 'active,running').

key.name: status-inactive
key.description: Comma-separated list of values that should give a yellow light.

key.name: status-failed
key.description: Comma-separated list of values that should give a red light.

key.name: drop-window-x
key.summary: X position of the Drop window

key.name: drop-window-y
key.summary: Y position of the Drop window

key.name: drop-force-reset
key.summary: Force reset of Drop window layout
key.description: Trigger a full reset of the Drop window's position, size, and side to default values.

key.name: drop-window-top-margin
key.description: Minimum distance from the top of the monitor to avoid overlapping the top bar.

key.name: drop-window-bottom-margin
key.description: Margin at the bottom of the monitor to avoid overlapping the dash/dock.

key.name: drop-window-edge-offset
key.description: The number of pixels the Drop window remains visible from the screen edge when collapsed, and defines the interactive width of the resize handle.

key.name: drop-window-min-width
key.description: The minimum allowed width for the Drop window when resized by the user.

key.name: drop-window-min-height
key.description: The minimum allowed height for the Drop window when resized by the user.

key.name: drop-window-max-display-messages
key.summary: Maximum messages to display in chat history
key.description: The maximum number of messages to keep in the visible chat history before old messages are removed.

key.name: drop-window-default-scale-width
key.summary: Default width scale for Drop window
key.description: The scaling factor (e.g., 0.4 for 40%) of the monitor's width used to calculate the default Drop window width.

key.name: drop-window-default-max-width
key.summary: Maximum default width for Drop window
key.description: The maximum pixel width for the Drop window when its default size is calculated.
